figures.caption: FIG. 1: (a)–(b) Schematics of two types of DW profiles. Blue arrows indicate local Néel vectors, and green arrows show the DM vectors. (c) Domain wall width ∆ and (d) tilt-angle wavevector Γ versus (v − u)/c. Blue (red) curve indicates the case without (with) DMI. Parameters are A = 6.5 pJ/m, K = 0.1 MJ/m3, and D = 1.2 (0.6) mJ/m2 for the red dashed (solid) curves, with D2 − 2AK > 0 (< 0).
